Organization

Main conveners and topical groups.

The collaboration is organized around a small convener structure and topical groups spanning the main scientific communities.

Main Conveners

Main Convener 1

Main convener

Coordination of the collaboration and cross-community scientific exchange.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Main Convener 2

Main convener

Open quantum systems and applications across fundamental physics.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Main Convener 3

Main convener

Real-time dynamics, thermal field theory, and shared open-system methods.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Main Convener 4

Main convener

Community building, seminars, and topical coordination across research areas.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Topical Groups

Topical groups provide lightweight coordination around shared methods, questions, and events.

Heavy-Ion Physics

Open quantum systems in QCD matter, quarkonium dynamics, transport, thermal field theory, and real-time evolution.

Heavy-Ion Convener 1

Topical group convener

Open quantum systems in QCD matter, quarkonium dynamics, and transport.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Heavy-Ion Convener 2

Topical group convener

Thermal field theory, hard probes, and real-time QCD dynamics.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Heavy-Ion Convener 3

Topical group convener

Transport, effective theories, and non-equilibrium evolution in nuclear matter.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Heavy-Ion Convener 4

Topical group convener

Lattice inputs, spectral functions, and open-system phenomenology.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Neutrino Physics

Decoherence, flavor evolution, environmental effects, and dense media in neutrino systems.

Neutrino Convener 1

Topical group convener

Decoherence, flavor evolution, and dense-media neutrino dynamics.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Neutrino Convener 2

Topical group convener

Collective flavor evolution and environmental effects in neutrino systems.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Neutrino Convener 3

Topical group convener

Quantum kinetic equations, dense media, and astrophysical neutrino environments.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Neutrino Convener 4

Topical group convener

Neutrino oscillations, decoherence tests, and formal open-system approaches.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Cosmology

Open-system approaches to relic abundance, particle production, non-equilibrium dynamics, and the early universe.

Cosmology Convener 1

Topical group convener

Early-universe dynamics, particle production, and cosmological open systems.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Cosmology Convener 2

Topical group convener

Inflation, decoherence, and non-equilibrium quantum fields in curved backgrounds.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Cosmology Convener 3

Topical group convener

Relic abundance, thermal histories, and open-system methods in cosmology.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Quantum Simulation and Formal Theory

Hamiltonian methods, Lindblad and non-Lindblad dynamics, effective field theory, correlators, and quantum simulation.

Quantum Simulation Convener 1

Topical group convener

Formal theory, quantum simulation, effective dynamics, and correlators.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Quantum Simulation Convener 2

Topical group convener

Hamiltonian methods, Lindblad dynamics, and non-Markovian evolution.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Quantum Simulation Convener 3

Topical group convener

Digital and analog simulation of open quantum systems and real-time correlators.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added

Quantum Simulation Convener 4

Topical group convener

Effective field theory, influence functionals, and formal open-system methods.

Institution to be added

Mailing address to be added
